label: base-character
prompt: Marco, a warm, slightly tired but determined 34-year-old Latino man, a full-time working single dad. Short dark hair, light stubble, warm brown eyes, natural skin with subtle under-eye tiredness and smile lines. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual shirt or tee, no logos or graphics. Hyper-realistic photograph with super-detailed true-to-life skin texture: visible pores, fine lines, subtle natural blemishes and freckles, slight uneven skin tone and natural imperfections, not airbrushed and not too perfect. Natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up portrait.
